datapoints.description: Desired number of replicas for the deployment
datapoints.name: replicas_desired

datapoints.description: Number of replicas in ready state
datapoints.name: replicas_ready

datapoints.description: Number of replicas available to serve requests
datapoints.name: replicas_available

datapoints.description: Number of unavailable replicas (desired minus available)
datapoints.name: replicas_unavailable

datapoints.description: Container restart rate per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: container_restarts

datapoints.description: Ratio of ready replicas to desired (1.0 = fully healthy)
datapoints.name: ready_ratio

description: Discovers ACM hub deployments and monitors replica health, availability, and container restarts via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers ACM deployments across open-cluster-management, open-cluster-management-hub, and multicluster-engine namespaces using standard kube-state-metrics. Monitors replica availability and container restart rates. An unavailable replica or restart rate above zero indicates a component health issue.
name: ACM_Hub_Components
